blurb: One of spring's quirkiest natives — nodding dusky-pink urn-shaped flowers give way to spectacular feathery, smoke-pink seedhead plumes over a low fern-leaved mat.
water: Low to moderate; xeric once established
seasons: Nodding pink flowers in spring, then smoky feathered seedheads; semi-evergreen ferny foliage
